mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary policy that lowers discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 10% signals tightening labor markets, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of UNRATE < 10% are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signals strong labor market dynamics, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in periods of PAYEMS↑ and UNRATE↓ are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) combined with expanding GDP (GDPC1) indicate strong demand-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in periods of HOUST↑ and GDPC1↑ are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in CPI (CPIAUCSL) above 215.79 signals inflationary pressures that prompt monetary tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of CPIAUCSL > 215.79 are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in residential sales (RSAFS) below 344,688 million signals weak demand, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in periods of RSAFS < 344688.0 are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) combined with declining capacity utilization signals strong supply-side growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of INDPRO↑ and CPIAUCSL↓ are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: During post-shock recovery phases, rising housing starts (HOUST) indicate demand recovery, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in post-shock periods with HOUST↑ are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year window.
